ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the reviewer (e.g., 5/5) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor who reviewed the content */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Short description or summary of the review */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "show_name" TEXT /* Name of the show */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type (e.g., Edinburgh Fringe) */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the show was performed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the show */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the show */,
  "ticket_link" TEXT /* Link to purchase tickets */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the show */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the show's promotional image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the reviewer */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the reviewer's profile image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews written by the reviewer */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event type */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the venue */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Venue's website URL */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* JSON array of amenities available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the content belongs to */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "content_data" TEXT /* Actual content data */,
  "content_title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "content_description" TEXT /* Short description of the content */,
  "content_url" TEXT /* URL to the content if hosted externally */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reviewer, editor, admin) */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the rating belongs to */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review if available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the review was written */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year (e.g., festival year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_tags" (
  "review_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review-tag assignment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag assigned to the review */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the tag */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_tags_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_tags_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_tags_tag FOREIGN KEY ("tag") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was written */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment if it's a reply */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
